meaning: n.埃塞俄比亚(非洲东部国家)
examples: The situation in Ethiopia in particular is worrisome.
It's a similar picture across the border in Ethiopia.
Ethiopia has almost the lowest oil consumption per capita in the world.

Besides Somalia and the Netherlands, Ms Hirsi Ali has lived in Ethiopia, Kenya and Saudi Arabia.
